description_long: This coffee machine features a compact, rectangular body with a smooth, matte finish in light beige and gray tones. The front panel displays three round buttons aligned vertically on the upper right, likely for power and brewing controls, and a central spout for dispensing coffee. A portafilter handle extends from the front, and a steam wand is attached to the left side, suitable for frothing milk. The drip tray at the base is ribbed and slightly recessed, designed to catch spills and excess liquid. The back of the machine is plain, with a large, light-colored water reservoir visible. The overall design is modern and functional, with clearly defined interactive components for brewing and steaming.
description: A compact, modern coffee machine in beige and gray with a front control panel, portafilter, and steam wand. It features a ribbed drip tray and a large rear water reservoir.
description_view_0: Front view showing three vertically aligned buttons, central spout, portafilter handle, and ribbed drip tray.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the steam wand and the side profile of the portafilter handle.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the large, plain water reservoir and the back panel with minimal features.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the side profile of the machine and the portafilter handle extending outward.
attribute_control_panel_layout: Three round buttons arranged vertically on the upper right of the front panel, with no visible labeling.
